# VivahGo LLM Full Context

Repo-backed knowledge snapshot date: 2026-04-09
Scope: this file is derived from the local codebase and config, not from live production fetches. Use it as a high-confidence map of product intent, public routes, data shapes, and verified URLs. Do not treat dynamic inventories, vendor availability, or live billing amounts as guaranteed current unless re-fetched from live endpoints.

## 1. Canonical Identity

Brand
- VivahGo
- Legal/operating name used in legal pages: VivahGo Planners (operating as VivahGo)

Primary domains
- Marketing site: https://vivahgo.com
- Planner workspace domain: https://planner.vivahgo.com

Core description
- VivahGo is a wedding planning platform built for Indian weddings.
- It combines a shared planner workspace with public wedding websites, RSVP flows, vendor onboarding, subscriptions, careers, and admin operations.
- It is explicitly positioned for couples, families, and wedding planners/studios.

Primary market and locale
- Language/locale in SEO and feeds: en-IN
- Core positioning: Indian weddings
- Structured-data area served: India, UAE, USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Singapore

Official contact and grievance details
- Support email: support@vivahgo.com
- Grievance email: grievance@vivahgo.com
- Grievance Officer: Nikhil Mundhra
- Postal address: 79, West Mukherjee Nagar, Kingsway Camp, New Delhi - 110009
- Privacy-page grievance SLA: acknowledge within 48 hours and endeavor to resolve within 30 days
- WhatsApp support number in code: 918383874103

Official social links
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vivah.go/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vivahgo/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/

Useful brand/media URLs
- Logo: https://vivahgo.com/logo.svg
- Social preview image: https://vivahgo.com/social-preview.jpg
- Sitemap: https://vivahgo.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://vivahgo.com/robots.txt
- Guides RSS feed: https://vivahgo.com/guides/feed.xml

## 2. What VivahGo Actually Does

High-confidence product areas
- Shared wedding planner workspace
- Event planning across multiple ceremonies
- Budget tracking and expense management
- Guest list management and RSVP tracking
- Vendor directory, vendor coordination, and vendor portal
- Public wedding website publishing
- Collaborator sharing with roles
- Multi-plan and multi-workspace management
- Subscription checkout and billing
- Careers page and application intake
- Feedback, privacy, terms, and data deletion flows

Strongest product narrative
- VivahGo is meant to replace fragmented wedding planning across WhatsApp, spreadsheets, memory, and repeated family calls.
- The core promise is "one shared source of truth" across tasks, budgets, guests, vendors, timelines, and guest-facing pages.
- The product repeatedly emphasizes Indian-wedding complexity: multiple ceremonies, many stakeholders, family-heavy approvals, hospitality logistics, and ceremony-level planning.

Primary audiences
- Couples planning Indian weddings
- Families coordinating across branches, functions, and guest lists
- Wedding planners and studios managing client weddings
- Teams handling multi-event, destination, or hospitality-heavy weddings

## 3. Verified Public Route Surface

Top-level public routes
- https://vivahgo.com
- https://vivahgo.com/home
- https://vivahgo.com/pricing
- https://vivahgo.com/guides
- https://vivahgo.com/careers
- https://vivahgo.com/vendor
- https://vivahgo.com/wedding
- https://planner.vivahgo.com

Legal/support public routes handled by the frontend router
- https://vivahgo.com/terms
- https://vivahgo.com/privacy-policy
- https://vivahgo.com/data-deletion-instructions

Dynamic public routes
- Public wedding website pattern: https://vivahgo.com/{slug}
- RSVP page pattern: https://vivahgo.com/rsvp/{token}
- Guide pattern: https://vivahgo.com/guides/{slug}

Important route safety rule
- Verified public URLs above are safe to use.
- Internal product sections like Home, Events, Budget, Guests, Vendors, Tasks, Account Settings, and Plan Switcher should be described as in-app navigation when a direct route is not explicitly verified.
- Do not fabricate routes like `/budget`, `/guests`, or `/tasks`.

Robots behavior
- `robots.txt` allows `/`
- `robots.txt` disallows `/admin`
- `robots.txt` disallows `/vendor`
- `robots.txt` disallows `/rsvp/`
- Sitemap declared at https://vivahgo.com/sitemap.xml

Indexed sitemap URLs currently present in repo
- https://vivahgo.com/
- https://vivahgo.com/pricing
- https://vivahgo.com/guides
- https://vivahgo.com/wedding-planner-app
- https://vivahgo.com/wedding-checklist-app
- https://vivahgo.com/wedding-budget-planner-app
- https://vivahgo.com/guest-list-rsvp-app
- https://vivahgo.com/wedding-vendor-manager-app
- https://vivahgo.com/indian-wedding-budget-template
- https://vivahgo.com/wedding-guest-list-template
- https://vivahgo.com/for-wedding-planners
- https://vivahgo.com/guides/indian-wedding-checklist
- https://vivahgo.com/guides/punjabi-wedding-timeline
- https://vivahgo.com/guides/wedding-budget-planner
- https://vivahgo.com/guides/guest-list-rsvp
- https://vivahgo.com/guides/vendor-coordination
- https://vivahgo.com/guides/destination-weddings
- https://vivahgo.com/careers

## 4. Planner Workspace: Core Product

Bottom-navigation planner sections
- Home
- Events
- Budget
- Guests
- Vendors
- Tasks

Top-bar / account surfaces
- Marriage plan selector
- Wedding date quick edit
- Wedding venue quick edit
- Account settings

Authentication modes
- Google-authenticated mode with persistence
- Demo mode with local sample data only
- Clerk token sign-in support exists on the backend

Planner capabilities
- Wedding dashboard with summary cards and countdown
- Events with create/update/delete
- Budget with expenses, category tracking, event linking, and charts
- Guests with names, side, phone, RSVP, count, and filtering
- Vendor browsing and vendor booking state inside the planner
- Tasks with groups, linked events, priorities, and completion tracking
- Multi-plan management for more than one wedding
- Workspace switching for multiple accessible planners
- Collaborator management and role-based access

Supported collaborator roles
- owner
- editor
- viewer

Role behavior
- Owner: full control, including sharing
- Editor: can modify planner data; some sharing operations are restricted
- Viewer: read-only

Planner data collections in the stored model
- marriages
- activePlanId
- customTemplates
- legacy wedding object
- events
- expenses
- guests
- vendors
- tasks

Multi-plan behavior and plan limits
- Starter tier is limited to 1 wedding plan
- Premium unlocks unlimited wedding workspaces
- Studio also includes unlimited planner-oriented workspace usage

Onboarding prompt areas
- bride name
- groom name
- wedding date
- city or venue
- guest count
- budget

Budget categories defined in code
- Venue
- Catering
- Decor & Flowers
- Photography & Video
- Attire & Jewelry
- Beauty & Grooming
- Music & DJ
- Invitations
- Transport
- Stay & Travel
- Pandit & Rituals
- Vendor Payments
- Miscellaneous

Expense areas defined in code
- Ceremony
- Guests
- Bride
- Groom
- Vendors
- General

Default core ceremony/event coverage
- Roka
- Sagai
- Ganesh Puja
- Haldi
- Mehndi
- Sangeet
- Baraat
- Jaimala
- Pheras
- Kanyadaan
- Saptapadi
- Sindoor Daan
- Reception
- Vidaai
- Griha Pravesh

Indian wedding plan templates
- Start Fresh
- Punjabi Wedding
- Gujarati Wedding
- Marwari Wedding
- Bengali Wedding
- South Indian Wedding

Template cultures
- Custom
- Punjabi
- Gujarati
- Marwari
- Bengali
- South Indian

Legacy template aliases still mapped in code
- traditional -> punjabi
- modern -> gujarati
- minimalist -> marwari
- adventure -> south-indian

Template-specific cultural examples
- Punjabi: Jaggo, Anand Karaj, Milni
- Gujarati: Gol Dhana, Mameru, Hasta Milap
- Marwari: Baan, Pithi Dastoor, Toran
- Bengali: Gaye Holud, Shubho Drishti, Bou Bhaat
- South Indian: Vratham, Kashi Yatra, Saptapadi

## 5. Wedding Websites and RSVP

Public wedding website routes
- Preview route: https://vivahgo.com/wedding
- Public route pattern: https://vivahgo.com/{slug}

How a public wedding website is resolved
- The public website uses a `websiteSlug` stored on a marriage plan.
- If `websiteSettings.isActive === false`, the public website resolves as not found.
- Public wedding data is read from the planner and filtered to the active public plan.

Public wedding website payload shape
- `wedding`
  Fields include bride, groom, date, venue, guests, budget
- `plan`
  Fields include id, bride, groom, date, venue, websiteSlug, websiteSettings
- `events`
  Only events for that plan
  Only events with `isPublicWebsiteVisible !== false`

What the public wedding website displays
- Couple names
- Wedding date
- Wedding venue
- Optional welcome message
- Optional countdown
- Optional event calendar
- Public events sorted by date

Wedding website themes
- royal-maroon
- garden-sage
- midnight-navy

Default wedding website settings
- isActive: true
- showCountdown: true
- showCalendar: true
- default theme: royal-maroon
- default hero tagline: "You are invited to celebrate"
- default schedule title: "Wedding Calendar"

Public wedding website SEO behavior
- Public wedding website metadata is generated server-side
- Public wedding websites use `robots: noindex, nofollow`
- Not-found public wedding pages also use `noindex, nofollow`

RSVP route
- https://vivahgo.com/rsvp/{token}

RSVP flow summary
- A session-authenticated editor/owner can create a guest RSVP link
- The link contains a signed token
- A guest can open the tokenized page and see invitation details
- The guest can confirm or decline
- If confirming, the guest can submit attending guest count
- Group member names can also be submitted
- After a successful submission, the RSVP token version is incremented
- That means the original RSVP link expires after use

Public RSVP payload includes
- Public wedding data
- Guest object with:
  - id
  - name
  - side
  - phone
  - invitedGuestCount
  - attendingGuestCount
  - groupMembers
  - rsvp

RSVP behavior and cautions
- RSVP pages use `robots: noindex, nofollow`
- `robots.txt` disallows `/rsvp/`
- A valid token is required
- Expired or invalid tokens return an error
- RSVP configuration depends on JWT/RSVP secrets being configured

## 6. Notifications and Reminder Features

Account-level notification features
- Browser notifications can be connected for planner reminders
- Event reminders toggle
- Payment reminders toggle

Paid reminder gating
- Real scheduled reminders are part of Premium and Studio
- Starter users are prompted to upgrade for paid reminders
- Editors and owners can configure paid reminder schedules; viewers cannot

Per-plan scheduled reminder settings
- Enable scheduled reminders for this plan
- Event reminder: 1 day before
- Event reminder: 3 hours before
- Payment reminder: 3 days before
- Payment reminder: day of due date

Reminder infrastructure
- Internal dispatch endpoint exists
- Dispatch authorization uses a secret header or bearer token
- Reminder tier gate disables real reminders for non-paid tiers

## 7. Vendor Ecosystem

Vendor-facing product areas
- Vendor registration
- Vendor business profile editing
- Media/portfolio management
- Verification document uploads
- Availability management
- Vendor dashboard
- Vendor support modal

Public vendor directory route
- Public UI/API surface: https://vivahgo.com/api/vendors

How the public vendor directory is built
- Only approved vendors are included
- The public directory payload combines:
  - Choice profiles curated by VivahGo
  - Plus-tier approved vendors
- Choice profiles are aggregated from approved vendor data by type

Public directory entry types
- Choice profile entries
- Direct vendor entries

Public vendor directory fields
- id
- name
- type
- subType
- bundledServices
- description
- country
- state
- city
- googleMapsLink
- phone
- website
- whatsappNumber
- availabilitySettings
- budgetRange
- locations
- media
- coverMediaUrl
- coverMediaType
- coverImageUrl
- tier
- isChoiceProfile

Vendor profile model fields
- googleId
- businessName
- type
- subType
- bundledServices
- country
- state
- city
- description
- googleMapsLink
- coverageAreas
- budgetRange
- phone
- website
- isApproved
- tier
- media
- verificationStatus
- verificationNotes
- verificationReviewedAt
- verificationReviewedBy
- verificationDocuments
- availabilitySettings

Vendor approval and verification states
- `isApproved` boolean controls public listing eligibility
- `verificationStatus` enum:
  - not_submitted
  - submitted
  - approved
  - rejected

Vendor tier states
- Free
- Plus
- Choice (public directory generated/curated layer)

Vendor availability settings
- hasDefaultCapacity
- defaultMaxCapacity
- dateOverrides with:
  - date
  - maxCapacity
  - bookingsCount

Vendor document types accepted for verification
- AADHAAR
- PAN
- PASSPORT
- DRIVING_LICENSE
- OTHER

Supported vendor types
- Venue
- Photography
- Catering
- Wedding Invitations
- Wedding Gifts
- Music
- Wedding Transportation
- Tent House
- Wedding Entertainment
- Florists
- Wedding Planners
- Wedding Videography
- Honeymoon
- Wedding Decorators
- Wedding Cakes
- Wedding DJ
- Pandit
- Photobooth
- Astrologers
- Party Places
- Choreographer
- Bridal & Pre-Bridal
- Groom Services

Representative vendor subtypes
- Venue: Wedding Lawns, Farmhouses, Hotels, Banquet Halls, Marriage Garden, Kalyana Mandapams, Wedding Resorts
- Wedding Transportation: Guest Transport, Airport Transfers, Luxury Cars, Baraat Entry Vehicles
- Wedding Entertainment: Live Performers, Celebrity Acts, Anchors / MC, Baraat Entertainment
- Music: Live Band, Dhol, Sufi Night, Instrumental Ensemble
- Wedding Invitations: Luxury Box Invitations, Digital E-Invites, Traditional Cards, Invitation Hampers
- Wedding Gifts: Guest Hampers, Shagun Gifts, Bridesmaid Gifts, Corporate Gifting
- Florists: Varmala Florals, Fresh Venue Florals, Car Florals, Table Arrangements
- Wedding Planners: Full Planning, Partial Planning, Wedding Coordination, Destination Wedding Planning
- Wedding Videography: Cinematic Wedding Films, Teaser Reels, Documentary Coverage, Drone Videography
- Wedding Decorators: Mandap Decor, Floral Decor, Stage Decor, Theme Decor
- Wedding Cakes: Tiered Wedding Cakes, Dessert Tables, Fondant Cakes, Eggless Cakes
- Wedding DJ: Sangeet DJ, Cocktail DJ, After Party DJ, Sound & Lights
- Pandit: Wedding Pandit, Phera Specialist, South Indian Priest, Samagri Guidance
- Photobooth: Instant Print Booth, GIF Booth, Mirror Booth, 360 Video Booth
- Astrologers: Kundli Matching, Muhurat Consultation, Remedy Guidance, Online Consultation
- Party Places: Cocktail Venues, Rooftop Venues, Private Dining, After Party Spaces
- Choreographer: Couple Choreography, Family Performances, Sangeet Concepts, At-Home Rehearsals
- Bridal & Pre-Bridal: Bridal Jewellery, Bridal Makeup Artists, Bridal Lehenga, Mehndi Artists, Makeup Salon, Trousseau Packing
- Groom Services: Sherwani, Salon

Vendor support flow
- Vendor support launches via WhatsApp
- Support number: 918383874103
- Common concern labels:
  - Profile update issue
  - Availability / calendar help
  - Media upload problem
  - Approval status question
  - Account access / login issue
  - Billing or subscription question
  - Other

Example coverage locations present in the sample vendor catalog
- Delhi
- Gurgaon
- Jaipur
- Noida
- Faridabad
- Ghaziabad
- Mumbai
- Udaipur
- Goa
- Varanasi
- Chandni Chowk
- Karol Bagh
- Online nationwide

## 8. Pricing, Subscription, and Billing

Plans
- Starter
- Premium
- Studio

Plan pricing shown in frontend code
- Starter: free
- Premium: INR 2,000 monthly; INR 1,600 yearly price shown in code
- Studio: INR 5,000 monthly; INR 4,000 yearly price shown in code

Starter plan positioning
- Best for getting a wedding out of chats and into one clear workspace
- Includes one unified wedding workspace
- Includes events, guests, budgets, vendors, checklist/progress, WhatsApp guest reminders, culture-specific templates, collaborators

Premium plan positioning
- Best for active planning with more family involvement and tighter coordination
- Includes everything in Starter
- Includes unlimited wedding workspaces
- Includes personalized wedding website
- Includes real scheduled reminders
- Includes advanced workspace management

Studio plan positioning
- Best for planners and studios running multiple client weddings
- Includes everything in Premium
- Includes client-ready workspaces
- Includes custom templates
- Includes requests for up to 2 custom features

Billing behavior
- Currency: INR
- Billing cycles: monthly and yearly
- Coupons supported
- Quote endpoint returns base amount, final amount, currency, applied coupon, plan, billing cycle, requiresPayment
- Payment processor: Razorpay
- Zero-amount flows can confirm internally without Razorpay
- Receipts/bills are generated and persisted

Billing receipt data model
- googleId
- email
- receiptNumber
- plan
- billingCycle
- currency
- baseAmount
- amount
- couponCode
- discountPercent
- paymentProvider (`razorpay` or `internal`)
- paymentReference
- status (`paid`, `issued`, `payment_due`, `failed`)
- emailDeliveryStatus (`pending`, `sent`, `failed`, `skipped`)
- issuedAt
- currentPeriodEnd
- meta

Subscription API notes
- Status endpoint returns starter/active if no paid subscription is found
- Portal endpoint currently returns placeholder behavior (`501`)
- Webhook endpoint expects Razorpay webhook signature verification

## 9. Careers

Public careers page
- https://vivahgo.com/careers

Public careers API
- https://vivahgo.com/api/careers

Careers page positioning
- "Build calmer wedding planning tools with a small team that ships."
- Emphasizes software for Indian weddings, family alignment, and better vendor operations

Resume rules enforced by code
- PDF only
- Maximum size: 2 MB
- LinkedIn and portfolio URLs must start with `http://` or `https://`

Career application fields
- jobId
- fullName
- email
- phone
- location
- linkedInUrl
- portfolioUrl
- coverLetter
- resumeFilename
- resumeMimeType
- resumeBase64

Career application source
- `source: careers-page`

Career application rate limit
- 5 submissions per hour per network

Roles currently in `config/careers.json`
- Founding Product Designer
  Team: Design
  Location: Remote / India
  Type: Full-time
  Summary: Shape the end-to-end VivahGo experience across marketing, couple workflows, and internal tools.
- Full Stack Engineer
  Team: Engineering
  Location: Remote / India
  Type: Full-time
  Summary: Build product features across the React frontend, APIs, admin tooling, and infrastructure integrations.
- Vendor Growth & Operations
  Team: Operations
  Location: Jaipur / Hybrid
  Type: Full-time
  Summary: Help onboard, support, and grow the vendor side of the VivahGo marketplace.

## 10. Query / SEO Landing Pages

These pages are significant because they are public, indexable, and structured for marketing/SEO. They are good first-pass crawl targets for an external model.

1. `/wedding-planner-app`
- Title: Wedding Planner App
- Purpose: explain the full shared wedding workspace
- Hero summary: tasks, budgets, guests, vendors, RSVPs, timelines, and wedding websites in one place
- Main use cases:
  - active family involvement
  - fewer follow-up calls
  - planners coordinating many stakeholders
  - large or destination weddings
- Related guides: indian-wedding-checklist, wedding-budget-planner, vendor-coordination

2. `/wedding-checklist-app`
- Title: Wedding Checklist App
- Purpose: ceremony-level tasks, owners, deadlines, approvals, execution
- Main use cases:
  - couples managing from memory today
  - family work split across multiple people
  - planner review workflows
  - multi-function dependency-heavy weddings
- Related guides: indian-wedding-checklist, punjabi-wedding-timeline, vendor-coordination

3. `/wedding-budget-planner-app`
- Title: Wedding Budget Planner App
- Purpose: planned spend, actual spend, vendor balances, due dates, ceremony-wise costs
- Main use cases:
  - real family budgets
  - several ceremonies with shared costs
  - planner vendor-balance tracking
  - destination/hospitality-heavy weddings
- Related guides: wedding-budget-planner, vendor-coordination, guest-list-rsvp

4. `/guest-list-rsvp-app`
- Title: Guest List and RSVP App
- Purpose: invitations, confirmations, family sides, follow-ups, headcount integrity
- Main use cases:
  - families collecting names from multiple branches
  - hospitality and rooming planning
  - planners locking final headcount
  - destination/travel-heavy weddings
- Related guides: guest-list-rsvp, wedding-budget-planner, indian-wedding-checklist

5. `/wedding-vendor-manager-app`
- Title: Wedding Vendor Manager App
- Purpose: bookings, deliverables, payment checkpoints, timelines, event-day coordination
- Main use cases:
  - couples locking vendors
  - planners managing many vendor teams
  - families approving quotes and balances
  - multi-venue or multi-function weddings
- Related guides: vendor-coordination, wedding-budget-planner, punjabi-wedding-timeline

6. `/indian-wedding-budget-template`
- Title: Indian Wedding Budget Template
- Purpose: free budget template plus benchmark/cost content
- Contains data/benchmark sections in code for sample budget split, regional budget ranges, catering spend by guest count, and priorities
- Has 11 FAQs, more than the other landing pages
- Related guides: wedding-budget-planner, vendor-coordination, guest-list-rsvp

7. `/wedding-guest-list-template`
- Title: Wedding Guest List Template
- Purpose: organize family sides, invitation status, RSVPs, plus-ones, rooming, transport, headcounts
- Related guides: guest-list-rsvp, indian-wedding-checklist, wedding-budget-planner

8. `/for-wedding-planners`
- Title: Wedding Planning Software for Wedding Planners
- Purpose: planner/studio-facing product narrative
- Main use cases:
  - solo wedding planners
  - boutique studios
  - planners handling family-heavy Indian weddings
  - teams wanting fewer manual status updates
- Related guides: vendor-coordination, punjabi-wedding-timeline, guest-list-rsvp

## 11. Guide Library

Guide index
- https://vivahgo.com/guides
- RSS feed: https://vivahgo.com/guides/feed.xml

Guide inventory

1. `indian-wedding-checklist`
- URL: https://vivahgo.com/guides/indian-wedding-checklist
- Summary: practical checklist for ceremonies, budgets, family decisions, and vendors
- Sections:
  - Start with one master planning system
  - Break the wedding into ceremony-level workflows
  - Turn the checklist into execution

2. `punjabi-wedding-timeline`
- URL: https://vivahgo.com/guides/punjabi-wedding-timeline
- Summary: roka, mehndi, sangeet, baraat, anand karaj, reception
- Sections:
  - Plan the full sequence before refining details
  - Keep celebration energy and logistics aligned
  - Use the timeline to reduce repeated follow-up

3. `wedding-budget-planner`
- URL: https://vivahgo.com/guides/wedding-budget-planner
- Summary: venue, decor, catering, rituals, travel, vendor payments
- Sections:
  - Budget by category and by ceremony
  - Track advances and pending balances early
  - Connect the budget to planning decisions

4. `guest-list-rsvp`
- URL: https://vivahgo.com/guides/guest-list-rsvp
- Summary: family sides, follow-ups, guest counts, invitation responses
- Sections:
  - Keep one master guest list from the start
  - Treat RSVP tracking as operations, not admin
  - Connect guests to the wider wedding plan

5. `vendor-coordination`
- URL: https://vivahgo.com/guides/vendor-coordination
- Summary: photographers, decorators, venues, pandits, choreographers, transport, entertainment
- Sections:
  - Coordinate vendors from one source of truth
  - Track bookings beyond the vendor name
  - Make the event-day version simple

6. `destination-weddings`
- URL: https://vivahgo.com/guides/destination-weddings
- Summary: destination planning across Jaipur, Udaipur, Goa, Delhi NCR, Mumbai, and other wedding cities
- Sections:
  - Plan the destination as a system
  - Use ceremony planning to control complexity
  - Build city and venue visibility over time

## 12. Static Downloads and Utility URLs

Template downloads from `/public`
- Budget CSV template: https://vivahgo.com/templates/wedding-budget-template.csv
- Guest list CSV template: https://vivahgo.com/templates/wedding-guest-list-template.csv

Other useful static URLs
- Sitemap: https://vivahgo.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://vivahgo.com/robots.txt
- Guides RSS feed: https://vivahgo.com/guides/feed.xml
- Logo: https://vivahgo.com/logo.svg
- Icons: https://vivahgo.com/icons.svg
- Social preview: https://vivahgo.com/social-preview.jpg
- Thumbnail: https://vivahgo.com/Thumbnail.png

## 13. Public and Authenticated API Surface

Public endpoints
- `GET /api/health`
  Purpose: health check
- `GET /api/auth/csrf`
  Purpose: issue/refresh CSRF token
- `POST /api/auth/google`
  Purpose: sign in with Google credential
- `POST /api/auth/clerk`
  Purpose: sign in with Clerk token
- `GET /api/planner/public?slug={slug}`
  Purpose: read public wedding website data
- `GET /api/planner/rsvp?token={token}`
  Purpose: resolve RSVP token to invitation data
- `POST /api/planner/rsvp`
  Purpose: submit RSVP response
- `GET /api/vendors`
  Purpose: public vendor listing
- `GET /api/careers`
  Purpose: public job catalog

Session-authenticated planner endpoints
- `GET /api/planner/me`
- `PUT /api/planner/me`
- `GET /api/planner/access`
- `POST /api/planner/me/rsvp-link`
- `GET /api/planner/me/collaborators`
- `POST /api/planner/me/collaborators`
- `PUT /api/planner/me/collaborators`
- `DELETE /api/planner/me/collaborators`
- `GET /api/planner/me/notifications`
- `PUT /api/planner/me/notifications`
- `POST /api/planner/me/notifications`
- `DELETE /api/planner/me/notifications`

Session-authenticated vendor endpoints
- `GET /api/vendor/me`
- `POST /api/vendor/me`
- `PATCH /api/vendor/me`
- `POST /api/media/presigned-url`
- `POST /api/vendor/media`
- `PUT /api/vendor/media`
- `DELETE /api/vendor/media`
- `POST /api/media/verification-presigned-url`
- `POST /api/vendor/verification`
- `DELETE /api/vendor/verification`

Session-authenticated subscription endpoints
- `GET /api/subscription/status`
- `POST /api/subscription/quote`
- `POST /api/subscription/checkout`
- `POST /api/subscription/confirm`
- `POST /api/subscription/portal`

Admin/staff endpoints
- `GET /api/admin/me`
- `GET /api/admin/vendors`
- `PATCH /api/admin/vendors`
- `GET /api/admin/choice`
- `PATCH /api/admin/choice`
- `POST /api/admin/choice-media-upload`
- `GET /api/admin/staff`
- `POST /api/admin/staff`
- `PUT /api/admin/staff`
- `DELETE /api/admin/staff`
- `GET /api/admin/applications`
- `PATCH /api/admin/applications`
- `GET /api/admin/resume-download`
- `GET /api/admin/subscribers`

Webhook/internal endpoints
- `POST /api/subscription/webhook`
- `POST /api/planner/internal/reminder-dispatch`

Endpoint auth notes
- Planner and vendor mutation routes use cookie sessions plus CSRF protection
- Public wrapper routes for vendor list and planner public data set CORS headers
- Internal reminder dispatch uses a secret header or bearer token

## 14. SEO, Metadata, and Crawl Signals

Default SEO values in code
- Default site URL: https://vivahgo.com
- Default image path: /social-preview.jpg
- Theme color default: #6b0f0f
- Default locale: en_IN

Metadata behavior
- Marketing and query/guide pages are rendered with server metadata and structured data
- Query pages and guides have JSON-LD
- Public wedding website pages and RSVP pages are intentionally `noindex, nofollow`

Structured-data types used in the codebase
- Organization
- WebSite
- SoftwareApplication
- Offer
- OfferCatalog
- WebPage
- FAQPage
- ItemList
- BreadcrumbList
- Article
- CollectionPage

## 15. Tech Stack and Infrastructure

Frontend
- React 19
- Vite
- CSS and Tailwind tooling

Backend
- Vercel serverless functions under `api/`
- Local Express development server under `vivahgo/server/index.js`

Data and auth
- MongoDB with Mongoose
- Google OAuth verification
- JWT session cookies
- CSRF protection
- Clerk token sign-in support

Payments and messaging
- Razorpay
- Firebase Cloud Messaging
- Resend

Storage
- Cloudflare R2 for public media
- Backblaze B2 for private documents

Analytics/observability
- Vercel Analytics
- Vercel Speed Insights
- PostHog, Clarity, and Sentry modules also exist in the codebase

Mobile shell
- Capacitor iOS

## 16. Legal / Policy Facts

Privacy-policy scope includes
- website
- mobile application
- wedding planning tools
- public wedding websites
- RSVP tools
- vendor platform
- subscriptions
- support and feedback
- career application pages

Terms describe VivahGo as
- a digital wedding planning and wedding services platform
- possibly acting as platform provider, coordinator, aggregator, introducer, or contracting party depending on service/package/transaction

Legal/jurisdiction facts in Terms
- governed by laws of India
- courts at New Delhi, India have exclusive jurisdiction subject to dispute resolution clause
- arbitration seat and venue: New Delhi, India

Data deletion flow
- In-app path: sign in -> account settings -> Delete Account
- Deletion covers account profile and associated planner records including weddings, events, budgets, guests, vendors, tasks, and related workspace content
- If locked out, users are told to use the Feedback option and include their registered email

## 17. Public-Facing Content Signals and Testimonials

High-signal marketing trust claims in code
- Used by early couples and planners across India
- Built for multi-event Indian weddings
- Guests, budgets, vendors, and timelines together

Representative testimonial cities mentioned in marketing code
- Delhi
- Mumbai
- Bangalore
- Jaipur
- Gurgaon

Do not interpret testimonials as audited customer proof beyond repo marketing content.

## 18. LLM Safety Rules for This Product

Use these constraints when another model answers questions about VivahGo:

Do
- Use full URLs only for verified public routes
- Use in-app navigation language for unverified internal sections
- Prefer the official support/grievance contacts over guessing
- Describe dynamic wedding website and RSVP links as patterns requiring a real slug or token
- Treat vendor listings and public content as subject to change

Do not
- Invent direct URLs for internal tabs like Budget, Guests, or Tasks
- Promise vendor quality, legality, safety, or availability
- Promise exact live pricing beyond repo-backed plan prices unless re-fetched
- Claim a public wedding website exists without a real slug
- Claim an RSVP page exists without a real token
- Invent support policies, refund exceptions, or unavailable feature tiers

Recommended answer style for navigation questions
- Name the destination
- Give the verified URL if one exists
- If no verified URL exists, give the in-app path
- Explain why the user should go there
- Explain the next action once they arrive

## 19. Suggested Crawl / Retrieval Order For Another Model

Best first-pass crawl order
1. https://vivahgo.com
2. https://vivahgo.com/pricing
3. https://vivahgo.com/wedding-planner-app
4. https://vivahgo.com/wedding-checklist-app
5. https://vivahgo.com/wedding-budget-planner-app
6. https://vivahgo.com/guest-list-rsvp-app
7. https://vivahgo.com/wedding-vendor-manager-app
8. https://vivahgo.com/indian-wedding-budget-template
9. https://vivahgo.com/wedding-guest-list-template
10. https://vivahgo.com/for-wedding-planners
11. https://vivahgo.com/guides
12. All guide URLs from sitemap/feed
13. https://vivahgo.com/careers
14. https://vivahgo.com/privacy-policy
15. https://vivahgo.com/terms
16. https://vivahgo.com/data-deletion-instructions
17. https://vivahgo.com/sitemap.xml
18. https://vivahgo.com/guides/feed.xml
19. Public APIs such as `/api/vendors`, `/api/careers`, `/api/health`

Only fetch when you have a real identifier
- https://vivahgo.com/{slug}
- https://vivahgo.com/rsvp/{token}
- https://vivahgo.com/api/planner/public?slug={slug}
- https://vivahgo.com/api/planner/rsvp?token={token}
